query: SELECT c.name, c.email, c.project, c.contactTrustTier, c.enrichmentSource, c.title FROM contacts c WHERE c.project IN ('Bass Strait Decommissioning Infrastructure Upgrade (Barry Beach)', 'Bruce Highway Safety Upgrades Program', 'Olympic Dam Expansion — BHP') AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' ORDER BY c.project
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT c.name, c.email, c.project, c.contactTrustTier, c.enrichmentSource, c.title FROM contacts c WHERE c.project IN ('Bass Strait Decommissioning Infrastructure Upgrade (Barry Beach)', 'Bruce Highway Safety Upgrades Program', 'Olympic Dam Expansion — BHP') AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' ORDER BY c.project
